mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, proc_name, proc_key, proc_de_key, `status`, var_json, proc_form_url_app, proc_form_start_url_app, task_title, task_type, starter_id, starter_org_id, starter_name, starter_org_name, starter_dept_id, starter_dept_name, flags, pid, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, proc_form_url, proc_re_id, procinst_id, app_key, tenant, biz_id

mapper.update: update t_wf_hi_ru_procinst set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, proc_name = #{procName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_key = #{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_de_key = #{procDeKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, var_json = #{varJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, proc_form_url_app = #{procFormUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_start_url_app = #{procFormStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_title = #{taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, task_type = #{taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, starter_id = #{starterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starter_org_id = #{starterOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starter_name = #{starterName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starter_org_name = #{starterOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starter_dept_id = #{starterDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starter_dept_name = #{starterDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pid = #{pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, proc_form_data_key = #{procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_key = #{procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_url = #{procFormUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_re_id = #{procReId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, procinst_id = #{procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant = #{tenant,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, biz_id = #{bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_hi_ru_procinst (gmt_create, gmt_modified, proc_name, proc_key, proc_de_key, `status`, var_json, proc_form_url_app, proc_form_start_url_app, task_title, task_type, starter_id, starter_org_id, starter_name, starter_org_name, starter_dept_id, starter_dept_name, flags, pid, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, proc_form_url, proc_re_id, procinst_id, app_key, tenant, biz_id) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.procName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procDeKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.varJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.procFormUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.starterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.starterOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.starterName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.starterOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.starterDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.starterDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procReId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tenant,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from t_wf_hi_ru_procinst where proc_key = #{procKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
